issues.description: GiveDon action missing 'rested' property. Card text specifies the DON!! card should be rested after being added. Should include 'rested':true

Missing condition for optional effect. Card text says 'You may...' indicating this is optional/conditional, but DSL has no condition to represent the optional nature or the prerequisite check for 2 face-down Life cards

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] You may turn 2 cards from the top of your Life cards face-up: Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
